scripts.build: printf 'export const environment = { production: true, supabaseUrl: "%s", supabaseKey: "%s", spoonacularApiKey: "%s", mealDbApiKey: "1" };' "$supabaseUrl" "$supabaseKey" "$spoonacularApiKey" > src/environments/environment.prod.ts && ng build --configuration production
scripts.build:prod: printf 'export const environment = { production: true, supabaseUrl: "%s", supabaseKey: "%s", spoonacularApiKey: "%s", mealDbApiKey: "%s" };' "$supabaseUrl" "$supabaseKey" "$spoonacularApiKey" "$mealDbApiKey" > src/environments/environment.prod.ts && ng build --configuration production
